label: AFUE Compliance Ratio

_meta.description: Ratio of target AFUE to reference AFUE, expressed as percentage. Values >= 100% indicate compliance. AFUE (Annual Fuel Utilization Efficiency) measures furnace/boiler efficiency.

inputs.name: mechanical.heating.afue
inputs.description: Target model AFUE (j_115) - e.g., 0.96 for 96% efficient

inputs.name: reference.mechanical.heating.afue
inputs.description: Reference model AFUE (ref_j_115), injected via cross-model sync

preconditions.description: Reference AFUE must be positive for ratio calculation

behavior.note: Higher target AFUE = higher compliance percentage
Default to 100% (compliant) when no reference value available

architectureNote: Reference model self-comparison is not an explicit parameter. Compliance nodes always compute in the Target model context. Reference values arrive via cross-model sync (reference.* bridge inputs). When Reference model computes for itself, compliance nodes are not evaluated.
